message.content:
@startuml
!theme plain

class DwarenMineWorker {
  + goToSleep()
  + wakeUp()
  + goHome()
  + goToMine()
  + String name()
  + void work()
}

class DwarenGoldmineFacade {
  + Collection<DwarenMineWorker> worker
  + makeAction(worker:Collection<DwarenMineWorker>,actions)
  + startNewDay()
  + digOutMine()
  + endDay()
}

class DwarenCartOperator {
}

class DwarenGoldDigger {
}

class DwarenTunneDigger {
}

DwarenCartOperator --|> DwarenMineWorker
DwarenGoldDigger --|> DwarenMineWorker
DwarenTunneDigger --|> DwarenMineWorker

DwarenGoldmineFacade ..> DwarenMineWorker

note left of DwarenMineWorker
  A
end note

note right of DwarenGoldmineFacade
  C
end note

note left of DwarenCartOperator
  C
end note

note left of DwarenGoldDigger
  C
end note

note left of DwarenTunneDigger
  C
end note

@enduml
